description: Gold-v1 dataset — 214 atomic issues across 167 conversations. Evidence-based labeling: blank fields = omitted keys, needs_object triggers follow-up.
policy_overrides: needs_object in Maintenance_Object or Management_Object always triggers expected_followup_fields, regardless of CSV should_ask_followup value (Decision 2)
expected_needs_human_triage is false for all rows — gold set contains only classifiable issues
